title: The FalseWork Papers
description: An open research programme on kernels, commas, and the structural limits of generative systems. Six CC-BY-4.0 papers with an open validation queue and a Lean 4 formalization target. Papers 1-5 form the core series; paper 6 is an exploratory practitioner-outcome companion. The repository maintains authoritative Markdown sources, per-paper release archives, public validation items, and a correction architecture described in Paper 2.
